name: StraightDimension.StraightDimensionAttributes
summary: The StraightDimensionAttributes class contains the attributes of the straight dimension.

constructors.name: StraightDimension.StraightDimensionAttributes
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the StraightDimension.StraightDimensionAttributes class

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

params.name: ObjectToCompare
params.doc: The object to be used for comparing.

returns.doc: True if all the fields (except for the database GUID) of the objects match.

params.name: AttributeFile
params.doc: The filename of the attribute file.

properties.name: DimensionValuePostfix
properties.summary: The postfix for the dimension's value.

properties.name: DimensionValuePrefix
properties.summary: The prefix for the dimension's value.

properties.name: Exaggeration
properties.summary: The exaggeration attributes of the dimension.

properties.name: MiddleLowerTag
properties.summary: The dimension tag placed under the dimension value.
